description: A promise wrapped with its key still opens the door.

hints.text: The goal is $(A \land (A \to B)) \to B$. We're given $A$ and the promise $A \to B$ bundled together. If you can extract both, [modus-ponens|modus ponens] takes care of the rest. Start by assuming the [conjunction|conjunction].
Peel off the left half — that's $A$, the key.
Now the right half — that's $A \to B$, the promise itself.
You have the promise at step 3 and the key at step 2. Use [modus-ponens|modus ponens] to unlock $B$.
